title: Student Dormitories
content:
Student Dormitories

Dormitory Registration Documents

Okan Homepage

Dormitory Registration Documents

MENU

Every student registered to our dormitories and university can apply. Documents required for this;

Criminal record and archive record (to be obtained from e-government by selecting an official institution)

1 passport size photo

Student certificate

Student Commitment (to be filled out in dormitories during dormitory registration and/or room delivery)
